title: Custom Webhook provider config
description: Configuration shape for the generic HMAC-signed JSON webhook provider. Escape hatch for tenants using Segment / Rudderstack / custom analytics warehouses.

webhook_url.description: HTTPS endpoint. HTTP is refused (TLS required).

hmac_secret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. 32 chars minimum. Encrypted at rest.

signature_header.description: HTTP header carrying the HMAC signature.

timestamp_header.description: HTTP header carrying the signature timestamp (Unix seconds).

signature_tolerance_seconds.description: Signature timestamp tolerance window. Prevents replay attacks.

custom_headers.description: Optional additional headers on every dispatch. Useful for auth (Bearer token, API key). Values encrypted at rest.

payload_shape.description: Payload shape. 'canonical' = the full marketing_event row + attribution + consent snapshot as-is. 'segment_track' = Segment's Track API shape. 'rudderstack_track' = Rudderstack's Track shape. 'custom' = call the tenant's own JSONata expression via the transform_expression field.

transform_expression.description: Optional JSONata expression to transform the canonical payload before dispatch. Only used when payload_shape='custom'.
